mobile.visibleAlert: 敵潰走/再集結1群 / 群集 再集結

notes: Enemy morale is now distinct from command collapse.
Damage lowers morale; low morale and cohesion can move enemy groups from steady to wavering to routing.
Routing or regrouping groups move rearward and do not attack until they recover.
Regrouping is deliberately held long enough to be visible on map tokens, alerts, and battle logs.
